When rating us after your stay, please consider that Airbnb’s ratings are totally different than the classic hotel star rating system. You should know that Airbnb can close down a listing that drops below an average of 4.3 stars. There system is rather confusing. To give you a better understanding, we designed the following (cheeky) guide to the rating system: ***** (5 stars) = perfection does not exist, but considering what I paid and where I stayed, I was happy here. **** (4 stars) = several issues need to be improved. *** (3 stars) = major problems ** (2 stars) = close the place down * (1 stars) = put the hosts in jail We always strive to give our guests a 5 star experience. Please let us know of any problem you may have had during your stay and we will do everything within our power to solve it for future. We hope to hear from you again soon. Dear Johan, Thank you so much for choosing to stay in our apartment we are so excited to host you! Here is some information that you will find useful. Please read this carefully. GETTING TO THE APARTMENT The apartment is located at the building called THE VANTAGE which is situated on 23, Tyrwhitt Avenue in Rosebank. You are welcome to reach out to us for detailed instructions on how to get to the building. ABOUT THE NEIGHBOURHOOD The area around THE VANTAGE is safe and secure and is a less than a 2 minute walk from the Rosebank mall which has banks, restaurants, a movie theatre and lots more (including a Starbucks just up the road from the apartment). CHECK IN The check-in time is from 14:00, but please do let us know your expected time of arrival. We welcome guests personally through a team on site between 14:00 and 20:00 hours. Our team member will show you the facilities of the apartment. Should you be reaching after 20:00, please reach out to us and make prior arrangements at least 24 hours in advance. Kindly note that as per building rules, you will be required to present proof of identification at check in that includes guests & your visitors. The acceptable identification is a South African bar coded ID Book or Card, a Government issued Drivers License or an International Passport. A copy of this document will be taken and handled as per legal requirements. CHECK OUT The check out time is strictly till 10:00. HOUSE RULES Please note that the building is a residential premises and guests are required to adhere to the building rules. At check in, you should familiarize yourselves with the rules. You will be required to accept these rules at the electronic check in station. We would be happy to provide you with a copy should you require. The visitors to the apartment will also have to adhere to the check in procedures. Amongst others, the following are the important rules that you have to abide by (and are a condition of your booking with us)- 1. Maximum 2 guests per one bedroom plus a maximum of 2 visitors during visiting hours. 2. Maximum 4 guests per two bedroom plus a maximum of 2 visitors during visiting hours. 3. The visitors can only be present in the apartment from 08:00 till 21:00 hours. 4. No loud music, TV or any form of noise. 5. No parties are allowed either inside the apartment or on corridors. 6. No consumption of alcohol in common areas of the building. 7. Due to the current Pandemic, all Government COVID regulations have to be followed. Failure to adhere to the above will result in eviction. In case you are evicted, no refund will be provided and in addition a building fine amount will be charged. A detailed check in message will be sent to you on the morning of your arrival by 10 AM. In the meantime, should you have any further questions/clarifications regarding the apartment or the neighborhood or generally about Johannesburg, please feel free to write to me. Always happy to help! Kind regards, Poonam and Team *by Grazie... 👌🏻 Hi Johan You are welcome ! We are glad you love the place! Have a great evening.

Dear Johan We are currently preparing to welcome you to Cape Town. To assist us with onboarding, kindly provide names and copies of IDs for all adult guests so that we can update our records and notify the building accordingly. Cape Town periodically experiences rolling power outages, known locally as loadshedding. The building in which you are staying is currently exempt from loadshedding so your accommodation experience should not be affected. We will soon be sending you our house rules and policies to accept before your stay. In the meanwhile, please do let us know whether you would like any assistance with logistics, including transfers. Warm regards Megan & Cormarie Sustainable Stays Team Dear Johan We ask all guests staying with us to abide by two sets of rules: the building rules, and the Sustainable Stays guest policy. If you have any questions or concerns regarding these rules, please contact us ahead of check-in. If we don't hear from you, we will assume you agree to abide by them. BUILDING RULES 1. COMMUNAL SWIMMING POOL AND ENTERTAINMENT AREAS a. No alcohol is to be consumedin the communal swimming pool. b. No glass bottles or containers are allowed in the swimming pool area. c. Parents are responsible for the safety and conduct of theirchildren in the common facilities, and children under the age of 16 shall be accompanied by an adult. e. Littering is not permitted, and all refuseis to be removed from the common facilities. f. Only conventional swimwear must be worn in the common facilities. Swimming or sunbathing in the nude or underwear is strictly prohibited. g. No unruly games are permitted in the common facilities. h. No diving is permitted in the communal swimming pool. i. No animals are allowedin the common facilities. j. No bicycles, tricycles, go-karts, skateboards, roller skatesetc are permitted in the common facilities. k. An owner, occupier and/ortenant must not create noise likely to interfere with the peaceful enjoyment of another section or another person's peaceful enjoyment of the common property. l. Excessive noise must be avoided from 00:00 to 07:00 daily, and between 22:00 to 07:00 on Sundays and public holidays. m. Radios, musical instruments, CD players, record players, television sets, etc., must be used in such a manner so as not to be heard in adjoining units or on the common property. n. Power tools and other noise-producing equipmentif operated outsidethe times stipulated above must cause minimum nuisance to other guests. 2. REFUSE DISPOSAL a. Refuse and recycling should be disposed of in the bins provided near the elevator lobby on each floor. b. No recycling or refuse should be left in common areas. 3. PARKING a. Guests should only use the allocated parking bay assigned to them by the host. 4. NOISE AND NUISANCE a. No noise after 22h00, whilst quiet must be maintained between the hours 24h00 and 07h00. b. All television, radio, and other appliances emitting sound, includingmusical instruments, must be kept at audio levels which are reasonable. c. No animials, reptiles, or birds are allowed in any apartment or common area. d. Guests shall not hang washing or laundry on balconies so as to be visible from the outside. e. No person/s may smoke any tobacco product, including electronic or similar smoking devices, including legalised marijuana, as it is strictly prohibited in the apartment and common areas. SUSTAINABLE STAYS GUEST POLICY 1. As part of our commitment to social sustainability, we advocate for societies in which communities can live free of crime and hatred, including gender-based violence, crimes towards children, terrorist activity and discriminatory behaviour. 2. We cannot accept bookings from guests that have a record of serious criminal activities or that we feel present a danger to other residents in the building, our staff or the property. 3. Hello Johan T, Thank you so much for booking our place at 16 Bree Street 16 on Bree for 2 nights from 15 May 2024 to 17 May 2024. We look forward to hosting you! Kindly note that we do not accept third party bookings without prior consent. If you are booking on behalf of other travellers, please let us know right away. Warm regards, All of us here at Sustainable Stays Dear Johan We ask all guests staying with us to abide by two sets of rules: the building rules, and the Sustainable Stays guest policy. If you have any questions or concerns regarding these rules, please contact us ahead of check-in. If we don't hear from you, we will assume you agree to abide by them. BUILDING RULES 1. COMMUNAL SWIMMING POOL AND ENTERTAINMENT AREAS a. No alcohol is to be consumedin the communal swimming pool. b. No glass bottles or containers are allowed in the swimming pool area. c. No swimming is permitted before 07h00 and after 21h00. d. Parents are responsible for the safety and conduct of theirchildren in the common facilities, and children under the age of 16 shall be accompanied by an adult. e. Littering is not permitted, and all refuseis to be removed from the common facilities. f. Only conventional swimwear must be worn in the common facilities. Swimming or sunbathing in the nude or underwear is strictly prohibited. g. No unruly games are permitted in the common facilities. h. No diving is permitted in the communal swimming pool. i. No animals are allowedin the common facilities. j. No bicycles, tricycles, go-karts, skateboards, roller skatesetc are permitted in the common facilities. k. An owner, occupier and/ortenant must not create noise likely to interfere with the peaceful enjoyment of another section or another person's peaceful enjoyment of the common property. l. Excessive noise must be avoided from 00:00 to 07:00 daily, and between 22:00 to 07:00 on Sundays and public holidays. m. Radios, musical instruments, CD players, record players, television sets, etc., must be used in such a manner so as not to be heard in adjoining units or on the common property. n. Power tools and other noise-producing equipmentif operated outsidethe times stipulated above must cause minimum nuisance to other guests. 2. REFUSE DISPOSAL a. Refuse and recycling should be disposed of in the bins provided near the elevator lobby on each floor. b. No recycling or refuse should be left in common areas. 3. PARKING a. Guests should only use the allocated parking bay assigned to them by the host. 4. NOISE AND NUISANCE a. No noise after 22h00, whilst quiet must be maintained between the hours 24h00 and 07h00. b. All television, radio, and other appliances emitting sound, includingmusical instruments, must be kept at audio levels which are reasonable. c. No animials, reptiles, or birds are allowed in any apartment or common area. d. Guests shall not hang washing or laundry on balconies so as to be visible from the outside. e. No person/s may smoke any tobacco product, including electronic or similar smoking devices, including legalised marijuana, as it is strictly prohibited in the apartment and common areas. SUSTAINABLE STAYS GUEST POLICY 1. As part of our commitment to social sustainability, we advocate for societies in which communities can live free of crime and hatred, including gender-based violence, crimes towards children, terrorist activity and discriminatory behaviour. 2. We cannot accept bookings from guests that have a record of serious criminal activities or that we feel present a danger to other residents in the building, our staff or the property. 3. We reserve the right to reject or cancel bookings from, and revoke all access for, persons that are found to have declared incorrect or misleading information as part of their booking process. 4. We reserve the right to cancel bookings should any of our staff feel threatened, disrespected or suffer harm at the hands of a guest or those accompanying them, or that guest is found to have violated the Airbnb conduct rules, the building’s conduct rules, our own House Rules or the conditions of this Policy, all of which are made available to the guest prior to check in. 5. We require the guest staying in the space to accept responsibility for their travel companions and visitors and require that the guest providing the check in information to make these informed declarations on behalf of persons in the party staying in or visiting the space. 6. By proceeding with this booking, the main guest hereby warrants that none of the persons in the group: · have been found guilty of serious or ‘contact’ crimes; · have a history of abusive or violent conduct; · knowingly engage in serious illegal activities; · are flagged on terrorism, criminal and / or predatory watchlists; or · present a danger to the property and / or the other guests and residents the building. 7. The party accepts that any contravention, perceived or otherwise, of this Policy or its referenced rules (the “Incidents”), may lead to: · the immediate cancellation of the booking without refund; · immediate revocation of access to the building and / or the space; · imposition of monetary penalties in respect of damages caused, costs incurred and / or other due recoveries in respect of the Incidents; · further enforcement action; · reporting of the Incident(s) as well as the persons involved to other professional bodies, statutory / regulatory bodies, law enforcement agencies, the booking platform (e.g., Airbnb), and any other body to whom we are obliged, or feel an obligation, to report the incident(s); all subject to the confines of our legal and professional obligations, including those in respect of privacy, confidentiality and protection of information. Rest Assured's Heritage MQ10 model is exceptionally popular in the hospitality industry. The combination of luxurious soft foam and ultra-tough coils create the perfect sleeping partner. The Heritage Bonnell Coil is constructed using the bonnell hourglass-shaped coil (six-turn) - This ensures equal distribution of tension throughout the entire spring unit, while each coil is double-knotted, top and bottom to increase strength and durability. Coils are double-tempered for extra durability and offer more stable support for heavier weight - perfect for persons with a larger build or those who require firm support. The six-turn coil has 33% more working wire than a 5-turn, this allows more support and interaction with the body, thus alleviating joint pain. A reinforced Hip Zone offers additional support - 6 high-density foam bars in the middle third of the mattress prevent and absorb any vibration between the coils and provide extra support in the hip area. Firm, reconstituted foam, high density foam and fibre surround both sides of this dual sided mattress to provide better surface comfort and an unmatched luxurious feel. The Heritage MQ10 mattress is upholstered in a soft touch knitted ticking and micro-quilted fibre and foam.

From the Airbnb app: We will impose fees subject to a minimum cancellation fee of $50 USD and a maximum cancellation fee of $1,000 USD. The fee is based on the reservation amount and when the reservation is canceled: If the reservation is canceled 48 hours or less before check-in, or after check-in, the fee is 50% of the reservation amount for the nights not stayed If the reservation is canceled more than 48 hours, and 30 days or less, before check-in, the fee is 25% of the reservation amount If the reservation is canceled more than 30 days before check-in, the fee is 10% of the reservation amount When calculating cancellation fees, the reservation amount includes the base rate, cleaning fee, and any pet fees, but excludes taxes and guest fees. If the calculated cancellation fee is less than $50 USD, it will be adjusted up to $50 USD, and if the calculated fee is more than $1,000 USD, it will be adjusted down to $1,000 USD. It is exceptionally popular in the hospitality industry. The combination of luxurious soft foam and ultra-tough coils create the perfect sleeping partner. The Heritage Bonnell Coil is constructed using the bonnell hourglass-shaped coil (six-turn) - This ensures equal distribution of tension throughout the entire spring unit, while each coil is double-knotted, top and bottom to increase strength and durability. Coils are double-tempered for extra durability and offer more stable support for heavier weight - perfect for persons with a larger build or those who require firm support. The six-turn coil has 33% more working wire than a 5-turn, this allows more support and interaction with the body, thus alleviating joint pain. A reinforced Hip Zone offers additional support - 6 high-density foam bars in the middle third of the mattress prevent and absorb any vibration between the coils and provide extra support in the hip area. Firm, reconstituted foam, high density foam and fibre surround both sides of this dual sided mattress to provide better surface comfort and an unmatched luxurious feel. The Heritage MQ10 mattress is upholstered in a soft touch knitted ticking and micro-quilted fibre and foam.

Unfortunaltely it happens that when the Barracks is fully booked that they have to move shorter bookings and longer duration bookings between rooms as to facilitate optimal utilisation. This is standard hotel practice. The advent of AirBnB, where clients choose their own room, obviously provides a bit of a hurdle to the above. I have repeatedly taken this up with the management company, but with AirBnB bookings being dwarfed by booking-com bookings, they are following the path which gives them best utilisation. When comparing the price between booking-com and airnb it is evident that they make 20-40% more revenue on a booking-com booking than the airbnb's. This time of year finding a room in CPT is a feat, and adopting the hotel mindset, their thinking was that 502 is an upgrade for 303, as their system tells them that, notwithstanding that 303 is a corner unit with a lovely view off the balcony. I will continue to push for not moving my clients, as they will point out the ARPU differential between the clients. I hope that you can see the factors at play above, and trust that you can see fit to not penalise me, for a bigger ongoing struggle. Dear Ismaël, the Barracks use the Rest Assured's Heritage MQ10 model for all rooms. It is exceptionally popular in the hospitality industry. The combination of luxurious soft foam and ultra-tough coils create the perfect sleeping partner. The Heritage Bonnell Coil is constructed using the bonnell hourglass-shaped coil (six-turn) - This ensures equal distribution of tension throughout the entire spring unit, while each coil is double-knotted, top and bottom to increase strength and durability. Coils are double-tempered for extra durability and offer more stable support for heavier weight - perfect for persons with a larger build or those who require firm support. The six-turn coil has 33% more working wire than a 5-turn, this allows more support and interaction with the body, thus alleviating joint pain. A reinforced Hip Zone offers additional support - 6 high-density foam bars in the middle third of the mattress prevent and absorb any vibration between the coils and provide extra support in the hip area. Firm, reconstituted foam, high density foam and fibre surround both sides of this dual sided mattress to provide better surface comfort and an unmatched luxurious feel. The Heritage MQ10 mattress is upholstered in a soft touch knitted ticking and micro-quilted fibre and foam.
